subject: A quick thought for The Streetwear Studio
body:
Hi Ben,

We know how busy things get running a brand like The Streetwear Studio, and we've reached out a couple of times already. We understand if our previous emails got lost in the shuffle.

However, we genuinely believe we could be a valuable partner for your brand, especially with your focus on in-store shopping and delivery. We're so confident in our premium quality and reliable delivery that we'd love to offer you something tangible: free samples of our best-selling items, shipped directly to you with absolutely no commitment.

Imagine feeling the quality of our Hoodies & Sweatshirts (starting at $7.00 USD FOB for MOQ 300, 100-day lead time) or our T-Shirts (starting at $4.00 USD FOB for MOQ 500, 90-day lead time) in your hands. It's the best way to truly experience what Bassi Clothing offers.

Would you be open to a quick chat to discuss what samples would be most relevant for The Streetwear Studio?

We look forward to hearing from you and exploring how we can support your brand's growth.

Sincerely,

The Team at Bassi Clothing

subject: A quick thought for MURMUR - premium garment samples?
body:
Hi Andreea,

We know you're incredibly busy building MURMUR's unique vision, and we respect your time.

We've reached out a couple of times, and instead of another long email, we thought we'd offer something more tangible: a complimentary sample package, entirely on us. We believe seeing and feeling our premium quality firsthand is the best way to understand how we could support MURMUR's commitment to celebrating femininity and strength.

We could send samples of our:

*   Hoodies & Sweatshirts (MOQ 300, 100 days production, from $7.00 USD FOB)
*   T-Shirts (MOQ 500, 90 days production, from $4.00 USD FOB)
*   Sustainable / Organic Cotton Garments (MOQ 300, 22 days production, from $5.00 USD FOB)

There's absolutely no obligation. Just a chance for you to experience our quality.

Would you be open to receiving a few samples at your convenience? Just reply to this email, and we'll handle the rest.

We look forward to hearing from you and exploring how Bassi Clothing can become a valuable partner for MURMUR.

We work with fashion retailers across the UK and EU, and I'd love to explore if we could be a reliable manufacturing partner for your upcoming collections.

Would a quick 15-minute call this week work to discuss your sourcing needs? I can also send over our catalog and samples — no commitment.

subject: Quick check-in: Bassi Clothing & Entrance Store
body:
Hi Coca,

We know how busy things get at Entrance Store, especially with managing your diverse range of trendy clothes and accessories. We've sent a couple of emails, and we wanted to offer a tangible way to see how Bassi Clothing could support your brand.

We'd love to send you a few free samples from our premium range, completely without obligation. Perhaps a sample of our high-quality Hoodies & Sweatshirts (MOQ 300, 7.00-10.00 USD FOB) or a T-Shirt (MOQ 500, 4.00-6.00 USD FOB) to showcase our consistent quality and ethical manufacturing.

It's a no-pressure way to experience our commitment to premium garment manufacturing firsthand. Would you be open to receiving a small package from us?

If you'd like to explore how Bassi Clothing can become a reliable manufacturing partner for Entrance Store, we invite you to schedule a brief, no-obligation consultation with our team. We're confident we can demonstrate significant value for your brand, offering competitive pricing, flexible MOQs, and a dedicated account manager to ensure a seamless experience from design to delivery. We look forward to hearing from you.

We work with fashion retailers across the UK and EU, and I'd love to explore if we could be a reliable manufacturing partner for your upcoming collections.

Would a quick 15-minute call this week work to discuss your sourcing needs? I can also send over our catalog and samples — no commitment.

subject: A Quick Hello from Bassi Clothing (No Commitment)
body:
Hi Emina,

We know how busy you are at Peek & Cloppenburg, and we respect your time. We've reached out a couple of times, and perhaps our timing wasn't right.

Instead of another long email, we wanted to offer something tangible: Would you be open to receiving a few complimentary samples of our premium hoodies or T-shirts? There's absolutely no commitment or obligation on your part. It's simply a way for you to experience our quality firsthand.

We're confident our Hoodies & Sweatshirts (MOQ 300, 100-day lead time, $7.00-$10.00 USD FOB) or T-Shirts (MOQ 500, 90-day lead time, $4.00-$6.00 USD FOB) could be a great fit for Peek & Cloppenburg's collections.

Just reply to this email if you'd like to explore this, or if you prefer, you can book a brief 15-minute chat with our team here: [Link to Calendar]. We look forward to the possibility of connecting with you.

subject: Quick follow-up for Canali Boutique: Free Samples?
body:
Hi Michele,

We understand how busy you must be at Canali Boutique, and we've reached out a couple of times already. We don't want to take up much of your time, but we believe we could be a valuable partner for your premium apparel needs.

Instead of another long email, how about we send you some free samples of our premium T-Shirts or Hoodies? There's absolutely no commitment involved, just a chance for you to experience our quality firsthand.

We could send samples for:

*   T-Shirts (MOQ 500, Lead time 90 days, Price 4.00-6.00 USD FOB)
*   Hoodies & Sweatshirts (MOQ 300, Lead time 100 days, Price 7.00-10.00 USD FOB)

If this sounds interesting, simply reply to this email, and we'll arrange the details. It's a quick, no-pressure way to see if Bassi Clothing is the right fit for Canali Boutique.

To demonstrate our commitment to quality, we'd like to offer you a free sample of any garment from our range, with absolutely no commitment or hidden costs.

Consider trying a sample of our:

*   T-Shirts & Polo Shirts (MOQ 500, Lead time 22 days, Price 5.50-7.50 USD FOB)
*   Sustainable / Organic Cotton Garments (MOQ 300, Lead time 22 days, Price 5.00-7.00 USD FOB)

Would you be open to a quick chat next week to discuss which sample might be most relevant for Fred Perry? We're confident our quality speaks for itself.

We look forward to potentially connecting with you soon.

Best regards,
The Bassi Clothing Team

subject: A quick thought for La Factory - Bassi Clothing
body:
Hi Francois,

We know how busy things get, and we've tried to reach out a couple of times. No worries at all if you're swamped, but we had a quick idea for La Factory that we thought might be interesting.

Given your focus on eco-responsible fashion, we believe our sustainable/organic cotton garments could be a perfect fit. We offer these with an MOQ of 300 pieces and a lead time of just 22 days, priced from 5.00-7.00 USD FOB.

To make it easy, we'd love to send you a few free samples of our organic cotton T-shirts or hoodies - completely on us, with no obligation whatsoever. It's just a simple way to experience our quality firsthand.

Would you be open to receiving a few samples at your convenience?

We look forward to hearing from you and potentially helping La Factory enhance its offerings.

We work with fashion retailers across the UK and EU, and I'd love to explore if we could be a reliable manufacturing partner for your upcoming collections.

Would a quick 15-minute call this week work to discuss your sourcing needs? I can also send over our catalog and samples — no commitment.

subject: A quick thought for Urban Vintage Paris
body:
Hi,

We know you're busy at Urban Vintage Paris, and our previous emails might have caught you at the wrong time. We wanted to reach out one more time, as we truly believe our manufacturing capabilities could be a strong asset for your brand.

We specialise in premium garment manufacturing with reliable EU/UK delivery, and we're particularly adept at producing high-quality hoodies, sweatshirts, and t-shirts that we think would complement your streetwear aesthetic perfectly.

To show you the quality we offer, we'd be happy to send you a free sample of a hoodie or t-shirt, completely without obligation. This way, you can experience our craftsmanship firsthand.

Would you be open to a brief chat to discuss this, or perhaps just let us know which sample you'd prefer?

We work with fashion retailers across the UK and EU, and I'd love to explore if we could be a reliable manufacturing partner for your upcoming collections.

Would a quick 15-minute call this week work to discuss your sourcing needs? I can also send over our catalog and samples — no commitment.

subject: A quick thought for L'Habit Français
body:
Hi,

We know you're incredibly busy, and we've reached out a couple of times already. We understand that finding the right manufacturing partner for L'Habit Français's commitment to quality and traceability is crucial.

We believe our premium garment manufacturing, with reliable EU delivery and full compliance with UK/EU quality standards, could be a valuable asset. To make it easy, we'd like to offer you free samples of any of our core products, with absolutely no commitment.

Perhaps a sample of our:

*   T-Shirts & Polo Shirts (MOQ 500, Lead time 22 days, Price 5.50-7.50 USD FOB)
*   Hoodies & Sweatshirts (MOQ 300, Lead time 100 days, Price 7.00-10.00 USD FOB)
*   Sustainable / Organic Cotton Garments (MOQ 300, Lead time 22 days, Price 5.00-7.00 USD FOB)

Would you be open to a quick 15-minute chat next week to discuss which samples would be most relevant for L'Habit Français?

We are confident we can deliver the consistent quality and reliable production your brand deserves, all while being a direct manufacturer with transparent pricing.

Looking forward to hearing from you,

The Bassi Clothing Team
